name: wet-mcp
description: Web search, content extraction, and media download

EMBEDDING_MODELS.title: Embedding model chain (optional)
EMBEDDING_MODELS.description: CSV 'provider/model,provider/model' (order = litellm fallback); provider inferred from prefix. Empty = local ONNX (qwen3-embed). Example: jina_ai/jina-embeddings-v5-text-small,gemini/gemini-embedding-001

RERANK_MODELS.title: Rerank model chain (optional)
RERANK_MODELS.description: CSV 'provider/model,...'; provider inferred from prefix. Empty = local ONNX cross-encoder. Example: jina_ai/jina-reranker-v3

LLM_MODELS.title: LLM model chain (optional)
LLM_MODELS.description: CSV 'provider/model,...'; provider inferred from prefix. Empty = LLM features off. Example: gemini/gemini-3-flash-preview,openai/gpt-5.4-mini

JINA_AI_API_KEY.title: Jina AI API key (optional)
JINA_AI_API_KEY.description: Enables jina_ai/ models referenced in a model chain. Without any cloud key the server uses local ONNX. https://jina.ai/api-dashboard/

GEMINI_API_KEY.title: Gemini API key (optional)
GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Enables gemini/ models referenced in a model chain. https://ai.google.dev/

OPENAI_API_KEY.title: OpenAI API key (optional)
OPENAI_API_KEY.description: Enables openai/ models referenced in a model chain. https://platform.openai.com/api-keys

COHERE_API_KEY.title: Cohere API key (optional)
COHERE_API_KEY.description: Enables cohere/ models referenced in a model chain. https://dashboard.cohere.com/api-keys

GITHUB_TOKEN.title: GitHub personal access token (optional)
GITHUB_TOKEN.description: Optional. Bumps GitHub API rate limit (60->5000 req/hr) for library docs discovery. https://github.com/settings/tokens
